sections.label: Verse 1
lines: En un, mawhna khempeuh a pua khia Pa
Sihna Kalvary mual tungah
Singlamteh tung gimna sihna thuak in
Kei ading in a sisian hong luang

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong Gumpa Topa naak sungah
Sisan leh tui hong luang khia hi
Ka lung sungah om tawntung hi
Mawhna ki sawp siang zo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawh sawp siang nang tui
A hong luang zo hi
Hong Gum Topa sihna mun pan
A tawntung in tua tui ah kisil ni
Hong Gum Topa kiang zuan in pai ni

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua si sungah a kisil khempeuh te
A mawhna teng vuk bang ngo ding
Na mawna khempeuh uh hong maisak ding
Ka kiang hong pai un Topa'n hong ci

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mawhna sungah ka pai kik nawn kei ding
Zeisu'n kei hong suakta sak ding
A Kha Siangtho in kei hong pi ding-a
A gam suangah hong lutpih ding hi
